title: najas minor var. indica
intro: Najas minor var. indica, also known as Indian water wort or Indian water lily, is a submerged aquatic plant that belongs to the Najadaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Najas minor var. indica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and infections.
